title: Regions Financial Showing It's All-Weather Qualities
text: Regions Financial reported mixed second quarter results with on-target net interest income, better fee-based income, and higher expenses driven by unusual fraud-related expenses. This Southeastern bank continues to show the strength of its deposit franchise, with best-in-class deposit betas and attractive funding costs relative to many peers. Slowing loan demand and higher credit losses are near-term threats to growth and there is considerable uncertainty today about future capital requirements as regulators mull new rules.

title: Regions Financial Corporation (RF) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Regions Financial Corporation (NYSE:RF ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 21, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Dana Nolan - Investor Relations John Turner - President and Chief Executive Officer David Turner - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Scott Siefers - Piper Sandler Gerard Cassidy - RBC Ken Usdin - Jefferies Dave Rochester - Compass Point Matt O'Connor - Deutsche Bank Erika Najarian - UBS Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley John Pancari - Evercore Operator Good morning and welcome to the Regions Financial Corporation's Quarterly Earnings Call. My name is Christine and I will be your operator for today's call.

title: Investors Still Seem Scared to Death of These Stocks
text: Markets were slightly higher Friday afternoon. Regional bank stocks Regions Financial, Huntington Bancshares, and Comerica were all lower after reporting their results.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Q2 Earnings Miss, Revenues Beat
text: Higher NII on the back of decent loan demand and rising rates support Regions Financial's (RF) Q2 earnings amid increased provisions, deposit outflows and higher expenses.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Q2 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Regions Financial (RF) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Regions Financial (RF) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.59 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.60 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.59 per share a year ago.

title: Regions Financial matches profit expectations but topped on revenue, as loans increased while deposits fell
text: Regions Financial Corp. RF, +1.65% reported Friday second-quarter profit that was in line with expectations as revenue rose slightly above views, and as deposits dropped more than 8%. The regional bank's stock was still inactive in the premarket.

title: Alison Rand Appointed to the Regions Financial Corp. and Regions Bank Boards of Directors
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Regions Financial Corp. announced Alison Rand has been appointed to the boards of Regions Financial and its subsidiary, Regions Bank.

title: Regions Financial Corporation Increases Quarterly Common Dividend and Declares Preferred Stock Dividends
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Regions Financial Corp. announced an increase in its quarterly common dividend and declared cash dividends on Series B, C, D and E preferred shares.

title: Regions Financial (RF) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Declining NII, weakening loan demand, and a rise in expenses and reserves are likely to affect Regions Financial's (RF) Q2 results. Nonetheless, fee income is likely to support financials.

title: Regions Financial (RF) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Regions Financial (RF) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Regions Financial (RF) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to Regions Financial (RF) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.
